summary: Iteration 203: Tested validation gap fixes feature (PO Learning + Vendor Auto-Resolution). All 20 backend API tests passed. POST /api/readiness/fix-validation-gaps returns correct structure with po_learning, vendor_resolution, and reevaluation sections. POST /api/posting-patterns/system/run-full-cycle includes 2b_validation_gaps step. GET /api/readiness/metrics returns valid analytics. Unit tests for core logic (learn_vendor_po_validation_rate, auto_resolve_unmatched_vendor, compute_signals) pass when run directly with python3.

minor.issue: pytest-asyncio compatibility issue - tests pass with 'python3 tests/test_validation_gaps.py' but fail with pytest due to async fixture handling. Not a code bug, just test configuration.

critical_code_review_comments: gap_closer_service.py: learn_vendor_po_validation_rate() correctly auto-sets po_expected=false for vendors with >70% PO failure rate (min 3 docs)
gap_closer_service.py: auto_resolve_unmatched_vendor() uses 4 strategies: alias exact match, fuzzy profile name, fuzzy profile variant, word overlap/abbreviation matching with min_score=0.72
gap_closer_service.py: fix_all_validation_gaps() orchestrates 3 steps: PO learning, vendor resolution, re-evaluation
document_readiness_service.py: compute_signals() respects _vendor_profile_po_not_required flag to skip PO validation for learned vendors
readiness.py: POST /api/readiness/fix-validation-gaps endpoint at line 77 correctly calls fix_all_validation_gaps()
posting_patterns.py: run-full-cycle includes Step 2.5 (2b_validation_gaps) at lines 4051-4063

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/20 API tests passed, 5/5 unit tests passed via direct python execution)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - preview environment has limited test data (27 docs, mostly batch_parent/completed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 203 verified validation gap fixes feature. Key findings: (1) POST /api/readiness/fix-validation-gaps returns {po_learning: {vendors_learned, vendors_checked, details}, vendor_resolution: {resolved, attempted, details}, reevaluation: {total, upgraded, transitions}}. (2) POST /api/posting-patterns/system/run-full-cycle now has 8 steps including 2b_validation_gaps. (3) GET /api/readiness/metrics returns {total_documents, by_status, by_action, no_readiness_data, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons, top_reviewer_actions, confidence_by_status}. (4) Unit tests in test_validation_gaps.py pass when run with 'python3 tests/test_validation_gaps.py' but have pytest-asyncio compatibility issues. (5) Preview environment has 0 docs with validation gaps to fix (all docs are batch_parent or completed).

vendor_resolution has resolved, attempted, details - PASS
reevaluation has total, upgraded, transitions - PASS
automation-rate has automation_rate and total_documents - PASS

test_vendor_auto_resolution - PASS (fuzzy matching finds BC vendor profile)
test_po_learning_insufficient_docs - PASS (learning doesn't trigger with <3 docs)
